criteria.reason: Blueprint send now requires drafts approval, and targeted test proves unrelated approval does not unlock send.
Dangerous capability fallback policy requires human review and is covered by tests plus live policy check.
Dispatcher default is disabled in worker code and compose; production worker env is false.
Blueprint still queues through ActionOrchestrator and production dispatcher remains disabled with no dispatch logs.
Targeted tests, local py_compile, and backend lint baseline passed.
Production app/worker health, root HTTP 200, worker env false, no dispatch logs, and live imports were verified.

commands_run: ssh -i ~/.ssh/localos_prod -o ConnectTimeout=15 root@80.78.242.105 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose ps && docker compose logs --since 5m app | tail -n 80 && docker compose logs --since 5m worker | tail -n 80 && curl -I http://localhost:8000 && docker compose exec -T worker sh -lc "printenv OUTREACH_DISPATCH_ENABLED"'
ssh -i ~/.ssh/localos_prod -o ConnectTimeout=15 root@80.78.242.105 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app sh -lc "PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=/app/src python3 -c ..."'
